name: FNAF Strike
description: FNAF Strike is a shooting game where your mission is to shoot all incoming animatronics and explore endless corridors to find the exit in order to survive and unlock new weapons.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim Flashlight Space - Jump R - Reload G - Grenade F - Use C - Crouch
tags: 3D, Action, CSGO, First Person Shooter, Gun, Horror, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Unity3D, WebGL
